name: Check related books section in LYRASIS
fullName: Book detail view screen: Check related books section in LYRASIS

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Palace Marketplace' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'eBooks' catalog tab
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  Book 'bookInfo' is opened on book details screen
And  Related books section is displayed on book details screen
And  There is a list of related books on book details screen
And  More button in related books section is available on book details screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check related books section in LYRASIS

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Check related books section in LYRASIS
